summary: Tested Admin Subscription Management feature in User 360 + Upcoming Plan concept. Backend API tests (16/16 passed) for GET /api/admin/subscription/{uid}/details, POST /{uid}/edit, POST /{uid}/cancel with validation tests. Frontend UI tests verified Subscription tab in User 360 with Load Subscription Details button, Current Plan section, and Payment History section.

issues: Edit/Cancel buttons only appear when user has active paid plan - this is expected behavior but should be documented

critical_code_review_comments: Backend endpoints working correctly with proper validation for note requirement
Frontend Subscription tab correctly shows 'Load Subscription Details' button with data-testid='load-sub-details-btn'
Current Plan and Payment History sections render correctly
Edit/Cancel buttons are conditionally shown only when user has active paid subscription (expected behavior)
Upcoming plan card in DashboardModern.js has data-testid='upcoming-plan-card' and renders conditionally when stats.upcomingPlan exists
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Subscription Management feature tested. Backend APIs all working. Frontend Subscription tab in User 360 works correctly - shows Load Subscription Details button, Current Plan section, Payment History section. Edit/Cancel buttons only appear when user has active paid plan. Test user admin-test-123 currently has no active paid plan (Explorer/Free). To test Edit/Cancel modals, need a user with active paid subscription.

backend: POST /api/admin/subscription/{uid}/edit - validates note requirement, admin_uid requirement
POST /api/admin/subscription/{uid}/cancel - validates note requirement, admin_uid requirement, target validation
frontend: User 360 Subscription TAB (not admin action button) - clickable and shows content
Load Subscription Details button with data-testid='load-sub-details-btn' - working
Current Plan section - shows 'No active plan (Explorer/Free)' for free users
Payment History section - shows 'No payment history' when empty
Upcoming plan card in DashboardModern.js - conditionally rendered with data-testid='upcoming-plan-card'
